error_signature: Error when converting screenshot data from webhook
title: Error converting base64 image data in Binary node
symptom: The Binary node throws an error when attempting to convert screenshot data received from a webhook.
applies_when: Receiving base64 image data from a webhook
not_this_if: Data is not in base64 format
Using a different node for conversion
root_cause: The Binary node expects a raw base64 string without any data URI prefix. Including the prefix 'data:image/png;base64,' causes the conversion to fail.
fix_steps: Add a Function node before the Binary node
In the Function node, remove the 'data:image/png;base64,' prefix from the base64 string
Pass the cleaned base64 string to the Binary node for conversion
agent_instruction: Use a Function node to strip the data URI prefix from the base64 string before passing it to the Binary node.
